---
title: "Home"
about: 
  id: heading
  template: jolla
link-external-newwindow: true
---

:::{#heading}
I am a master's student at Osaka School of International Public Policy, the University of Osaka. My research interests include political representation, and public opinion. 

:::

<!-- ## Education -->


:::{.callout-note appearance="default"}

## News

:::

<!-- ## Research interests -->
